en_title: The Co-Lead Designer of Baldur's Gate 2 Turned Baldur's Gate 4 Down and I Don't Blame Him — Baldur's Gate 3 Is Pretty Much Impossible to Follow
cn_title: 《博德之门2》首席设计师谢绝《博德之门4》——坦言《博德之门3》难以超越
subtitle: 续作无人敢接
opus_summary: 《博德之门2》联合主设计师James Ohlen拒绝孩之宝邀请制作《博德之门4》，理由是无力超越《博德之门3》。Larian工作室也已表示无意续作。

paragraphs.en: After Baldur’s Gate 3’s enormous success, Baldur’s Gate 4 feels like an inevitability. That’s how the entertainment industry normally works: if a product everyone loves makes hundreds of millions of dollars, it’s guaranteed a sequel. But I’m not sure that established thinking works when it comes to Baldur’s Gate 4.
paragraphs.cn: 在《博德之门3》取得巨大成功后，《博德之门4》似乎不可避免。娱乐产业通常就是这么运作的：如果一部受人喜爱的产品赚了好几亿美元，那么续集是板上钉钉的事。但我不确定这套既定思维在《博德之门4》上是否适用。

paragraphs.en: First off, Larian itself moved on from Dungeons & Dragons to make Divinity . In an interview with IGN at GDC 2024, CEO Swen Vincke revealed Larian began work on Baldur’s Gate 3 DLC and even gave some thought to a potential Baldur's Gate 4 before pivoting away to other projects because the team was "going through the motions." "You could see the team was doing it because everyone felt like we had to do it, but it wasn’t really coming from the heart, and we’re very much a studio from the heart," Vincke added. "It’s what gotten us into misery and it’s also been the reasons for our success."
paragraphs.cn: 首先，Larian自己已经放下了《龙与地下城》，转而去开发《神界》系列。在GDC 2024上接受IGN采访时，CEO Swen Vincke透露，Larian曾着手开发《博德之门3》的DLC，甚至对潜在的《博德之门4》也做过一些考虑，但随后转向了其他项目，因为团队是在「走流程」。「你能看出来，大家去做这件事是因为觉得非做不可，但并非发自内心，而我们正是一家凭内心做游戏的工作室。」Vincke补充道，「这也曾让我们陷入困境，同样也是我们成功的原因。」

paragraphs.en: Hasbro, which owns Dungeonis & Dragons operator Wizards of the Coast, has since said it intends to make Baldur's Gate 4 . But it turns out developers are actually turning the project down, and while that sounds astonishing to hear, it makes perfect sense to me.
paragraphs.cn: 拥有《龙与地下城》运营商威世智的孩之宝已表态要做《博德之门4》。但事实上开发者们正在回绝这个项目，这听起来令人震惊，但我完全理解。

paragraphs.en: spoke with James Ohlen, co-lead designer of Baldur’s Gate 2 and former boss of Hasbro-owned Exodus developer Archetype Entertainment , and he revealed that Hasbro asked him to make Baldur’s Gate 4, but he said no. Ohlen told Hasbro boss Chris Cox, who had called him to ask about making Baldur’s Gate 4 as soon as he found out Larian wouldn't, that he “would fail.” Why? Because he didn’t think he could compete against Baldur’s Gate 3. “That would be insanity,” he said.
paragraphs.cn: 我采访了James Ohlen，他是《博德之门2》的联合主设计师，也是被孩之宝收购的Exodus开发商Archetype Entertainment的前负责人。他透露，孩之宝曾邀请他制作《博德之门4》，但他拒绝了。Ohlen告诉孩之宝老板Chris Cox，对方是在发现Larian不会做续作后打电话来询问他能否接手，而他回答自己「肯定会失败」。原因在于，他认为自己无法与《博德之门3》竞争。「那简直是疯了。」他说。

paragraphs.en: There’s more nuance to this, and it goes back to the unique way the hugely ambitious Baldur’s Gate 3 was made. Larian, which had years of experience making role-playing games with its own engine via the well-received and successful Divinity: Original Sin games before starting work on Baldur's Gate 3, put the game into Steam early access for years before its full launch in 2023. That long-running process and the invaluable feedback that came from it helped shape the game,
paragraphs.cn: 实际情况还要更微妙一些，这得追溯到《博德之门3》这款野心巨大的游戏独树一帜的制作方式。Larian在着手开发《博德之门3》之前，已有多年的角色扮演游戏开发经验，用自家引擎打造了口碑与销量双丰收的《神界：原罪》系列。他们把《博德之门3》放在Steam上以抢先体验的形式运营了好几年，直到2023年才正式发售。这种漫长的开发过程和从中获得的宝贵反馈，帮助塑造了这款游戏。

paragraphs.en: But on top of that, the developers at Larian are just amazing at what they do, their writers the best in the business, their quest designers the envy of the video game industry. Baldur’s Gate 3 is a masterpiece but it is also truly unique, with more content than any single player could ever hope to see. Most developers are not in the position to make a game like Baldur’s Gate 3. None, other than perhaps Rockstar, has the time, resources, or the freedom to make the sort of creative decisions that went into Baldur's Gate 3. Baldur’s Gate 3 is a single-player role-playing game that could last you forever, and truly, there are none in the modern era quite like it.
paragraphs.cn: 除此之外，Larian的开发者们在自己擅长的领域里就是出类拔萃：编剧是业界顶尖，任务设计师让整个游戏行业艳羡。《博德之门3》是一部杰作，同时也真正独一无二，其内容之多，任何单个玩家穷极一生都难以尽览。大多数开发商并不具备制作《博德之门3》这样一款游戏的条件。除了Rockstar，恐怕没有别的公司拥有制作《博德之门3》所需的时间、资源或创作自由度。《博德之门3》是一款能让你玩上永远的单人角色扮演游戏，而在现代游戏里，真正与之相仿的作品可以说绝无仅有。

paragraphs.en: Triple-A developers just don’t build video games this way. They are not set up to, nor are they even able to, make a game in the way Baldur’s Gate 3 was made. Especially now, with development budgets under intense pressure and publishers struggling for sales. Baldur’s Gate 4 feels to me like a game only Larian could make. And as the studio has made perfectly clear, it really isn’t interested at all.
paragraphs.cn: 3A级开发商根本不会用这种方式做游戏。它们没有，甚至也不具备像《博德之门3》那样去制作一款游戏的条件。尤其是在眼下开发预算压力巨大、发行商为销量苦苦挣扎的时候。在我看来，《博德之门4》是一款只有Larian才能做出来的游戏。而这家工作室已经把话说得很清楚——它对续作真的一点儿兴趣也没有。

paragraphs.en: How do you follow Baldur’s Gate 3, then? Ohlen, clearly, couldn’t see a path forward. He said he’d need to start from scratch, because Larian has walked away from Dungeons & Dragons and taken its engine with it. So, he’d need at least half a decade to build the tech, and there’s no way Larian would agree to licensing out its engine.
paragraphs.cn: 既然如此，又该如何接棒《博德之门3》呢？Ohlen显然看不到前路。他说自己得从零开始，因为Larian已经与《龙与地下城》分道扬镳，还带走了自家的引擎。因此他至少需要五年时间去构建相关技术，而Larian绝不可能同意向外授权自己的引擎。

paragraphs.en: Then there’s Larian boss Swen Vincke to contend with. He’s the CEO of the company and the majority shareholder, but he’s also the director of Baldur’s Gate 3, which means he is free to make creative decisions — for better and for worse. Most triple-A studio CEOs do not have such freedom or control.
paragraphs.cn: 此外，还有Larian的老板Swen Vincke这一关要过。他既是公司CEO兼大股东，也是《博德之门3》的导演，这意味着他可以自由做出创意决策——无论是好是坏。大多数3A工作室的CEO并没有这样的自由度或掌控权。

paragraphs.en: "Swen's always going to be the master of building those kinds of things,” Ohlen said. “It's really hard to take him off that throne, just because of everything — the tools, institutional knowledge, team."
paragraphs.cn: 「Swen永远会是这种项目的大师，」Ohlen说道，「想把他从那个王座上拉下来真的很难，原因就在于这一切——工具、团队积累的经验、整个团队。」

paragraphs.en: I think Baldur’s Gate 4 goes one of two ways: Hasbro tries to essentially make a bigger and better Baldur’s Gate 3, pumping hundreds of millions of dollars into a sequel that takes years to develop, launches on the next generation of consoles as well as PC, and probably isn’t as good as Baldur’s Gate 3 anyway despite all the creative freedom its developers were promised.
paragraphs.cn: 我认为《博德之门4》只有两条路可走：要么孩之宝试图做出一款更大更好的《博德之门3》，投入数亿美元(约合人民币数十亿元)打造一款开发耗时数年、在次世代主机和PC上推出的续作，但到头来很可能还是不如《博德之门3》——哪怕开发者被许诺了充分的创作自由。

paragraphs.en: Or, Hasbro takes a completely different approach. It agrees that it would be insane to compete with Baldur’s Gate 3 so it doesn’t try. Instead, it tasks a developer with making something completely different, something unexpected, something unique to that studio. Something smaller scale, maybe cheaper, maybe quicker. Perhaps this would be more of a risk. Perhaps it wouldn’t.
paragraphs.cn: 要么，孩之宝采取一种完全不同的思路。它承认与《博德之门3》竞争是件疯狂的事，因此干脆不去尝试。转而委托某家开发商去做些截然不同的东西，一些出乎意料、专属于那家工作室的独特作品。规模更小，也许更便宜，也许更快。这或许风险更大。也许不会。

paragraphs.en: Or maybe there's a third option — and the more I think about this problem, the more I come around to this as a solution — we just give up on Baldur’s Gate 4 entirely. Does Baldur’s Gate 3 even need a sequel? I’m not sure it does. I’m not sure it needs a TV adaptation that continues the story , either. Perhaps Hasbro would be better off doing to Baldur’s Gate what Larian is doing to Divinity and make a soft reboot. Baldur’s Gate 4 will face extremely tough comparisons with Baldur’s Gate 3. I’m not saying a Baldur’s Gate reboot wouldn’t, but it would perhaps take the pressure off, ever so slightly.
paragraphs.cn: 或者还有第三种选择——而我对这个问题想得越多，就越觉得这才是解决方案——干脆彻底放弃《博德之门4》。《博德之门3》真的需要续作吗？我不太确定。我也不确定它是否需要一部延续剧情的电视剧改编。或许孩之宝最好学学Larian对《神界》的做法，给《博德之门》来一次软重启。《博德之门4》将面临与《博德之门3》的极端严苛比较。我并不是说重启版《博德之门》就不会面临这种比较，但它或许能稍稍减轻压力。

paragraphs.en: Wesley is Director, News at IGN. Find him on Twitter at @wyp100. You can reach Wesley at wesley_yinpoole@ign.com or confidentially at wyp100@proton.me.
paragraphs.cn: Wesley是IGN新闻总监。你可以在Twitter上找到他：@wyp100。你可以通过wesley_yinpoole@ign.com联系Wesley，或通过wyp100@proton.me进行机密联系。
